metadata.description: Private GitHub Copilot plugin marketplace for development workflow skills

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Structured development workflow skills for implementing features, fixing vulnerabilities, and upgrading dependencies — with branch management, Opus review, and automated maintenance.

plugins.name: obsidian-llm-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for an active Obsidian vault. Seven skills for ingesting, querying, saving, linting, and managing a persistent wiki compiled from meetings, projects, and daily notes.
